violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. -Entrance to food line under repair. Untreated wood exposed.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was used for purpose other than handwashing. -found possible dark colored soft drink dumped in sink at time of inspection
Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. -Walk in cooler floors in need of cleaning
Lighting. — --Light intensity for walk-in refrigeration or food storage area was insufficient.
Storage and handling of maintenance items. — --Wet-use maintenance items, such as mops, were not placed in a position that allows proper air-drying. -Mop stored in mop sink unable to air-dry
